    getStatus() - Method in class com.emc.object.s3.bean.BucketDeletionStatus
    Overall status of the bucket delete task Valid values: PENDING, IN_PROGRESS, POST_PROCESSING, DONE, FAILED, ABORT_IN_PROGRESS, ABORTED
    PENDING - The task has been created and will start execution once it is successfully configured.

    Represents a source of object data that can be streamed in parallel parts of arbitrary ranges within the object.
    LargeFileUpload - Interface in com.emc.object.s3.lfu
     
    LargeFileUploader - Class in com.emc.object.s3
    Convenience class to facilitate multipart upload for large files.
    LargeFileUploader(S3Client, String, String, LargeFileMultipartSource) - Constructor for class com.emc.object.s3.LargeFileUploader
    Creates a new LargeFileUpload instance using the specified s3Client to upload from a multipartSource to bucket/key.
    LargeFileUploader(S3Client, String, String, File) - Constructor for class com.emc.object.s3.LargeFileUploader
    Creates a new LargeFileUpload instance using the specified s3Client to upload file to bucket/key.
    LargeFileUploader(S3Client, String, String, InputStream, long) - Constructor for class com.emc.object.s3.LargeFileUploader
    Creates a new LargeFileUpload instance using the specified s3Client to upload from a single stream to bucket/key.
    LargeFileUploader(S3Client, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class com.emc.object.s3.LargeFileUploader
    Creates a new LargeFileUpload instance using the specified s3Client to copy from srcBucket/srcKey to dstBucket/dstKey without streaming data between the client and ECS server.

    setAbortMpuOnFailure(boolean) - Method in class com.emc.object.s3.LargeFileUploader
    Specifies whether MPU is aborted with any failure If a failure occurs and abortMpuOnFailure is true, then MPU is aborted and the resumeContext is cleared (uploadId and uploadedParts are set to null).

    unmarshal(String) - Method in class com.emc.object.util.Iso8601DateTimeAdapter
